ORLANDO, Fla. â The PGA Merchandise Show is the golf industryâs gathering place for professionals and merchandisers to experience all the latest and greatest in equipment, operations, apparel, accessories, fitness and education. Participation in the 2024 event was the highest it's been in several years, and the showroom floor was buzzing for three straight days.

The apparel section did not disappoint with lots of first-time exhibitors hoping to get an order or two to validate dipping their toes in a very crowded market, alongside companies who started the same way and who now are going strong after a decade at the Show.

More of SI's 2024 PGA Show Coverage:Gear|Apparel|Top Deals

To say there is "something for everyone" would be a complete understatementâthere are plenty of choices in golf apparel from a myriad of brands large and small. From bold colors and prints, to more toned-down neutral palettes. From fun flirty golf skirts to tailored trousers, sophisticated styles to leisure wear looksâitâs all at the PGA Show. We picked a handful of favorites to share, but itâs really just scratching the surface of the vast array of golf apparel choices we have to look forward to this year.Â

How do you take a No. 1-selling shoe and make it better? Thatâs the question the footwear team at FootJoy had to ask themselves about the Premiere Seriesgolf shoes. Tall order when 40% of PGA Tour Players already trust its superior performance, comfort and innovative design. The answer was to keep pushing the envelope and amplify existing features with elevated materials, construction and physical attributes. Exquisite craftsmanship and detailing is elevated with luxurious, hand-selected full-grain leather. Exceptional comfort is achieved with advanced lightweight materials and custom OrthoLite FitBed. The mantra "Any Lie. Any Condition." is attained with revolutionary VersaTrax technology that delivers unparalleled traction and stability in every playing condition, and 360 degrees of grip on every playing surface. Fresh attractive colorways and style details are the crowning features that will keep the Premiere Series a must-have shoe for golfers of all levels. $189-$229.

Shop the FootJoy Premiere Series Line Through Our Partners at PGA TOUR Superstore

New, super tech-packed DRYVR hoodie coming out for spring called "Amos." Features include: 100% waterproof, windproof, extremely breathable, blue sign approved fabric, elastic drawstring at the hem, adjustable cuffs, smooth âslide and glideâ lining for movement, chest pockets, front pocked, shaped sleeves, and lightweight, stretch Gore-Tex C-knit fabric technology. But our favorite part of the Amos is the hood. It has an extra rain-protection peak at the top that allows rain to drip off away from your head, which is key especially when putting. It will come in navy, black and gray, sizes S to 3XL. $529,galvingreen.com

There are so many great golf and leisure pieces to look forward to this year from Ralph Lauren, but the biggest new feature to look for is all the menâs polos have stitched-in collars. This ensures the collar holds its shape, and when worn with a sweater or crewneck over top, it still looks sharp no matter what. Also the prints have been quieted down and made smaller, making them more versatile and easy to wear especially transitioning on and off the golf course to multiple functions. Another of our favorite standouts is the RLX menâs knit polo with herringbone pattern and a full-zip knit tech vest. Both have very sporty yet sophisticated looks that will add a welcome variation to any golf wardrobe.

Shop Ralph Lauren Styles Through Our Partners at PGA TOUR Superstore

There was a big display of red, white and blue colors at theJ. Lindebergbooth as the Scandinavian brand revealed the outfits for the USA golf teams at the Paris Olympics in France this year. The collection pays homage to the American flag using the same color palette, and artistic stars and stripes form a bold pattern complimented by solids that will be on polo shirts, compression tops, tracksuits, half-zip sweaters, joggers, golf bags, hoodies and more for players, caddies, coaches and staff. Fabrics made with ClimaCool and 37.5 will help keep the athletes cool and comfortable, while UV50 provides sun protection, and Lycra offers high-flexibility and stretch.

Shop J. Lindeberg With Our Partners at PGA TOUR Superstore

Traveling all the way from outside Venice, Italy, this was the brandâs first PGA Show appearance. Its collection of menâs and womenâs golf apparel is inspired by a strong passion for outdoor sports, nature and animals. The name Cocal means seagull in local dialect, and serves as the brandâs logo appearing in prints and on hats. Giovanna Novello is the founder and runs the business with her husband, but it was her mother who influenced her love of fashion. Giovanna danced as a young girl but her mother couldnât find anything but black dance wear, so she started making pieces for her daughter. The colorful pieces caught enough attention that a business was born. When Giovanna was older she became an equestrian and was, again, faced with limited wardrobe selections, so she decided to design and make her own. Friends urged her to carry the same functional styles over to golf clothing, and the Italian-made collection came to life.cocalwear.com

The company brought in former Fila designer Nancy Robatelle six months ago, and her mandate was to take the fall/winter collection into a more golf-centric direction. She created an abstract flower print with black background on fabric designed to show movement. The colorful print shows up on all the pieces either just on a shirt placket, or collar, or all over. Another standout are the womenâs Ponte fabric pants with side stripes that are thick and have a great drape. The heart-shaped back pockets are a cute, different detail, and comes in a cream color and a rich, dark olive that Robatelle says "is the new black." Matching quilted jackets with ribbed knit backing and a scuba mesh track jacket make complete, very versatile outfits.

Shop Swing Control Styles Through Our Partners at PGA TOUR Superstore

Puma's fall collection turns to more elevated basics with textured fabrics and softer neutral colorways, a trend we saw throughout the Show. One example is a half-zip, ribbed knit hoodie that looks like a turtleneck with a hood, so it offers a layered look in one piece. An all-over mini bubble textured hoodie worn under a quilted vest creates a comfortable, contemporary style thatâs a notch above the look a typical cotton hoodie offers.

For footwear, the Phantomcat Nitro was all the buzz at the show andwill be released on Feb. 15. The shoe is designed, developed and tested alongside tour athletes, and promises to offer an unrivaled traction experience bringing tour-level performance to every golfer. New proprietary Flexspike cleats have unrivaled traction, and a nitro foam heel delivers high rebound with lightweight responsiveness. Full-grain leather has a premium feel and has a one year waterproof guarantee, and a new anatomically shaped last ensures a more consistent fit.

Shop Puma Shoes Through Our Partners at PGA TOUR Superstore

Janice Ferguson helped start/write the Apparel Wire for Golf Press Associationâthe first weekly e-pub devoted to golf fashion that ran for eight years. She has also written for Golfweek, USGA, AGM, Morning Read, and covers the diversity of golf brands at PGA Shows. While she admits struggling to lower her handicap, she is determined to look good trying.Â

title: From Shoes to Stylish Olympic Outfits, 2024 Looks Like a Hit for Golf Apparel
description: The PGA Merchandise Show is a golf clotheshorse's dream and Janice Ferguson shows what caught her eye in Orlando.
